headline: Honeywell (HON) Lands Family Workplace Honor And PowerBank Solar Project
summary: Honeywell International (NasdaqGS:HON) has been recognized as a 5 star winner in Newsweek’s America’s Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Families list. The company has partnered with PowerBank Corp to complete a commercial scale solar project as part of a broader clean energy initiative. Honeywell operates across aerospace, building technologies, performance materials, and industrial automation. Its workplace policies and energy projects sit alongside a wide mix of end markets. For investors...

headline: Newsweek Names America’s Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Families 2026
summary: Aetna, Morgan Stanley, Edward Jones, Honeywell, Five Below, PNC, Shell Among 5-Star WinnersNEW YORK, July 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Newsweek, in partnership with Plant-A Insights Group, today announced America’s Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Families 2026, recognizing U.S. employers that are setting the standard for family-friendly workplace policies, caregiver support and employee well-being. (NASDAQ:HON)’s price target to $250 from $260 while keeping an Overweight rating, citing the Aerospace spin and updated Technologies guidance, and noted upside to 2026 […]

headline: What's Happening With GE Stock?
summary: The surface narrative surrounding GE Aerospace (GE) is dominated by its massive second quarter 2026 earnings beat and raised full year guidance, but the underlying data reveals a distinct tension between top-line acceleration and profitability. The defining insight is not the adjusted earnings per share of $2.02 against a $1.86 consensus, nor the $12.6 billion in adjusted revenue that marked a 24% year over year increase. headline: Earn 8.6% On EMR Stock By Selling Upside You Might Not Miss
summary: Get paid a guaranteed cash income on your Emerson Electric shares now, which you keep no matter what, just for agreeing to sell at a higher price if the stock gets there.
